name: Patrick Gelsinger
background: Patrick P. Gelsinger has been a director and Intel’s CEO since February 2021. He has over 40 years of technology and leadership experience, including 30 years at Intel in various engineering and leadership roles. Prior to returning to Intel, he served as CEO of VMware, Inc. from 2012 to 2021 and as President and COO of EMC Corp.’s Information Infrastructure Products business from 2009 to 2012.
